notes: Two §5.4 cosmetic-difference paths exercised at once: 'STONE'S THROW' (all-caps) vs 'Stone's Throw' (Dave Morrison's discovery interview example — must silent-PASS via normalize_text), AND bottler 'Stone's Throw Distillery, Inc.' vs application's 'Stone's Throw Distillery LLC' (different entity suffix — must silent-PASS via strip_corporate_suffixes).
